response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video for scenes and detected a vocal song performance. 2. Identified 'ULTRA C' as the song, with lyrics by Reel and music by TeddyLoid and Giga, based on on-screen text. 3. Used web search to find full lyrics for 'ULTRA C' and its English translation. 4. Mapped the scenes and performers. 5. Compiled the final JSON structure.
response.global_summary: The video features a skit involving VTubers (Anya Melfissa, Pavolia Reine, and IRyS) having a detective-themed conversation. This is followed by a choreographed musical performance of the song 'ULTRA C' by Giga and TeddyLoid, featuring the same trio. The video concludes with a final skit.

scenes.description: The VTubers are in a room, discussing a mystery. No vocal music is playing.
Anya Melfissa, Pavolia Reine, and IRyS perform the song 'ULTRA C' in a studio setting. The on-screen text identifies the song as 'ULTRA C' with lyrics by Reel and music by TeddyLoid and Giga.
scenes.performer_in_video: Anya Melfissa, Pavolia Reine, and IRyS

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Break through this alley, Awake now
(We’re awakening, updating, ey)

Gleaming and shining, wow, those carats are so nice
You naturally stand out, monopolizing all the attention
This tactic can’t be stolen

The answer “As much as you like” is reaching its peak
Fully updated a second ago, ya ya
Goodbye to anxiety, everyone else isn’t the enemy
No need to be polite, stick up your fingers

Ha~ Shake it, fate
Ah~ My own ultra C
Using those emotions as fuel, let’s carry on into overtime, omnipotent

Ah, my body

Living this way, make some noise
We’ll strike with a medical voice
The frenzy we carry spreads out, hitting its mark head-on
I’ll take that big applause (Burn out na na uh!)

What I want is to touch down
(Burn the revolution, update hey)
Go all out
(I’m awakening, overturning, ey)

Alone, it’s just kidding, but with you, it’s dreaming
Full of mistakes, misunderstandings, retake the excitement

Ey, even if I lose, I’ll continue, the price I paid for myself
That day… uh, there’s no way I don’t regret it
Adorn it on your chest, straighten up, chant it (You think I’m bad at giving up?) Believe in me

I’m a blue-burning flame, though time passes, the heart still yearns
Who is it, who is it, who is it? It’s me, now leave it to me
(Burn out na na uh!) Ha~

Breaking through the thorns, BAE! Make some noise
The beautiful finale, Get up! Hey, raise the bro
Rising up against the timid adversity, finally reaching the jackpot
I’ll give you a happy ending! (Burn out na na uh!)

What I want is to touch down
(Burn the revolution, update hey)
Go all out
(I’m awakening, overturning, ey)
